title: NUTRIUPS 1L Airtight Glass Food Storage Containers with Lids, Square Food Storage Set, BPA Free for Meal Prep, Travel, Freezer, Oven
features: 【1L Small Capacity】Great capacity food storage container can hold a significant amount of food, which is convenient for storing large quantities of food at once, reducing the frequency of food shopping and preserving freshness.

【Better sealing】Round food storage containers with lid usually have a BETTER sealed design, which can effectively prevent dust, moisture from entering the box. The airtight design of a large capacity food storage box helps to keep food fresh, maintaining the quality and taste of the food for a longer period.
【Easy to See】Clear glass storage boxes are made of tempered glass, which has a high transparency, allowing you to clearly see foods inside the box and making it easy to find and access them.
【Versatile to Use】Food storage container can be used to Storing food, Freezing food, Transporting food, Serving food, Organizing kitchen items., making it versatile and practical.

【Wide Application Range】Glass storage boxes are suitable for storing various items, such as food, medicines, cosmetics, office supplies, etc. They can help users effectively manage items and improve living and working efficiency.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Small Portion Storage 2 Microwave Safe 3 Oven Safe 4 Dishwasher Safe 5 For Any Occasions Best Choice for Small Portion Storage Manage Your Food More Effectively, Save Time & Maintain High Quality of Life. Keeping Your Food Fresh and Organized Food storage box is designed to be portable, allowing you to easily carry your lunch with you to work, school, or wherever you need to go. It reduces the need for single-use lunch containers and helps you reduce your carbon footprint. Sealed Food Storage Bowls with Locking Clips Keeping food fresh and preserving its quality and taste for a longer period. Sealed food storage box can help you save space in your refrigerator or cupboard by keeping food organized and in one place. Snap Tips: If the snaps do not close smoothly, simply remove the lid, align the snap tabs on the edge of the container, lightly press the middle of the lid with your palm, then press the snaps diagonally all around—you will know the lid is secured when you hear a “click”sound.
